pilot_meta.author_role: PronounAuthor authors seed frames + declares axes; Architecture expands mechanically; PronounAuthor reviews a ~20% sample.
pilot_meta.referent_axis_rule: 3rd-person only (per v1: mi/ti hide the DO/IO contrast, so the item can't catch the very error it exists for).
pilot_meta.misconception_target: transfer.dop_iop_confusion (English 'wait FOR / listen TO / look FOR / pay FOR' cues Italian IOP where the correct form is DOP).
pilot_meta.flag_default: wrong_answer_is_form_error_only = false (this class of item tests LEXICAL/argument-structure knowledge, not a form error).
pilot_meta.expansion_estimate: 6 short-answer seeds x 4 referent variants = 24 items; +1 multi-select seed x 4 referent x up to 5 lemma swaps = up to 20 items. Total ceiling around 44 items pending Arch's expansion policy on lemma-swap density.

seeds.frame_template: {antecedent} arriva sempre in ritardo; ____ {pres_1sg} in piazza da mezz'ora.
seeds.notes: Frame reads naturally for aspettare and cercare (both allow 'in piazza' as a plausible waiting/looking spot). Do NOT swap to guardare/ascoltare/pagare here - 'guardare in piazza da mezz'ora' is odd, 'pagare in piazza' means something specific.

seeds.frame_template: ____ {pres_1pl} davanti al bar da venti minuti, ma {antecedent} non arriva.
seeds.notes: Sentence-initial clitic (Lo / La / Li / Le, capital). Lemma swap OK for cercare ('we look for X in front of the bar' works). Aspettare-only would be safer if in doubt.

seeds.frame_template: Ho perso {antecedent}; ____ {pres_1sg} da un'ora ma non {pres_1sg}_riesco a trovare.
seeds.notes: Frame requires an inanimate antecedent for 'ho perso'. Rotate the antecedent axis with inanimate substitutions: 3sg_masc = 'il portafogli', 3sg_fem = 'la chiave', 3pl_masc = 'i documenti', 3pl_fem = 'le chiavi'. Not lemma-swappable (aspettare/guardare would be nonsensical with 'ho perso').

seeds.frame_template: Quando {antecedent} parla in televisione, ____ {pres_1sg} sempre con attenzione.
seeds.notes: 'guardare qualcuno in televisione' and 'ascoltare qualcuno' both natural. Not for aspettare/cercare/pagare (nonsensical).
Speaking well applies to both watching and listening. Not for aspettare/cercare/pagare.

seeds.frame_template: Il conto e' arrivato; {antecedent}, ____ {pres_1sg} io questa volta!
seeds.notes: Pagare transitive: 'I pay YOU' (not 'I pay FOR you' which is 'pagare per te'). Antecedent must be a person addressable directly (Marco/Sofia/ragazzi/ragazze). Not lemma-swappable.

seeds.frame_template: You want to say 'I'm waiting for {antecedent_english}' (informal, present). Which of these are correct? (Select all that apply.)

choices_template.note: Transfer error from English 'wait FOR'; aspettare is transitive in Italian.
'per' preposition transferred from English; not needed.

seeds.notes: The multi-select pilot instrument for the whole class - each item drills the transfer misconception (English preposition -> Italian IOP) and rewards the correct DOP AND the stressed alternative. Lemma-swappable across the whole class because the frame is a translation prompt, not a sentence to inflect.
